name: Potato Gnocchi with Wild Mushrooms And
recipeInstructions:
Preparing the Gnocchi:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Place rinsed potatoes on a bed of rock salt and bake until dry and fluffy, approximately 40 minutes.
3. Peel hot potatoes and run through a food mill.
4. Add eggs, seasonings, and flour (reserve 1/4 cup) to form smooth dough.
5. Roll into a smooth, airy dough; avoid overworking it.
6. Roll by hand into 1/2 inch cylinders.
7. Cut into one-inch pieces on a floured surface and roll each piece over the back of a fork to make shell-shaped gnocchi.
8. Blanch in simmering, unsalted water for two minutes or until they float for 30 seconds.
9. Remove from water and reserve.
Preparing the Wild Mushrooms and Parmigiano:
1. Clean and rinse mushrooms; pat dry.
2. Heat extra virgin olive oil in a heavy sauté pan and cook mushrooms vigorously at high heat.
3. Add shallots and garlic; cook until fragrant.
4. Deglaze with chicken stock, season to taste, reduce, and finish with Parmigiano and chives.
5. Garnish dish with shaved Parmigiano and chive sticks.
Yield: 4 servings
